central_question.text: Which Generative AI-based solutions (tools, agents, models, etc.) are available to support software engineering activities, particularly software construction, within industry and academia?

sub_questions.text: Where can these solutions be found?
How can these solutions be used?
What is the access and usage model for these solutions and costs?
What limitations must be considered for adopting these solutions?
What is the maturity level of these solutions?
Is there technical documentation, support, or an active community to facilitate these solutions in academia and industry?
What types of target users or roles typically engage with the proposed solutions?
Is there any collaboration with the industry to validate the proposals through case studies or experiments?
